item.title: Thesis report Week#4-5
item.description: The essence of estimation This week I have been working on Work on filtering visualization Implement multiple moving objects in the Simulation Implement multiple tracked objects in the simulation Implement Particle Filter Algorithm for single target Implement EKF with Probabilistic data Assosiation (PDAF) Implement PF with Probabilistic Data Assosiation (PDAF) [Multitarget-multisensor Tracking: Principles and Techniques : Yakkov Bar-Shalom Xiao-Rong Li] Filtering visualization Filters visualization for single target.

item.title: Thesis report Week#3
item.description: The essence of estimation The generation of information that has the following properties quality (accuracy/reliability) higher than the raw measurements contains information not directly available in the measurements [Multitarget-multisensor Tracking: Principles and Techniques : Yakkov Bar-Shalom Xiao-Rong Li] Mathematical view of state estimation. No access to variables inside the first two blocks The only accessible variable are the measurements which are affected by noise.

item.title: Semantic segmentation
item.description: Deep Fully Convolutional Networks for pixel-wise class prediction

item.title: Field Robot Event 2019
item.description: Competition on autonomous farming tasks / Heilbronn / July 2019

item.title: Moving object detector
item.description: Tracking moving objects using laser data
